Appearances:
Plaintiff GRANADA ENTERPRISE MANAGEMENT is present. Represented by Tony Davidoushous.
Attorney PATRICIA HENLE appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant JAMES YARBROUGH is present.
Attorney DENNIS LEE appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem TOM DROHAN, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of SEP-30-2013 is vacated. (D501/JPT)
